title: Watch: Iranians gather in Tehran following ceasefire announcement
summary_full: Pro-government demonstrators poured onto the streets of the Iranian capital after the announcement of the two-week conditional ceasefire between the US and Iran.
summary_public: Pro-government demonstrators poured onto the streets of the Iranian capital after the announcement of the two-week conditional ceasefire between the US and Iran.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Iranians gather in Tehran following ceasefire announcement
